underlying_goal: User wanted to find and test the 'Website Audit' skill, then try out the webapp-testing skill as an alternative
friction_detail: The requested 'Website Audit' skill was not found in the codebase, and the session ended while Playwright browsers were still downloading for the alternative webapp-testing skill.
brief_summary: User wanted to find 'Website Audit' skill which didn't exist, so they tried webapp-testing instead but session ended during Playwright browser download before any actual testing could occur.
